title: CaseCracker2
description:
Immersive Puzzle-SolvingAs a test subject, you won't just search for keywords among existing clues. While piecing together fragmented intelligence, you must also execute realistic police procedures such as "Retrieve Footage," "Search Warrants," "Access System," and "Crack Code." You will be fully immersed in an authentic police investigation process.Interwoven Network Across Case FilesCharacter networks intertwine, and intelligence overlaps between different case files. You must break down the barriers between isolated reports to uncover the latent connections linking multiple unsolved cases.Uncover Deep-Seated TruthsBeyond the main investigations, bizarre side cases and deep, hidden threads await your discovery. The ultimate truth is often far more brutal than the crimes themselves.Key FeaturesActive Deduction Gameplay: Stay hardcore; refuse passive multiple-choice reading!
Cross-File Connections: All cases share the same universe—each operates independently, yet is bound by underlying links!
Meta-Puzzle Extensions: Tangled hidden threads offer extra puzzles for you to dig into outside of the game itself.
description_short: Officer Jia has vanished, leaving a classified message pointing to the CaseCracker 2.0 system. Tear through suspects' alibis, look beyond the text, and extract hidden threads from seemingly unrelated intel. Will you find the ultimate truth, or a trap?
